items.content_html: Radiology Right Click v1.0 is a radiologist's quantitative friend, designed to improve quantitative radiology and streamline workflow. This AutoHotkey script provides a suite of tools accessible via right-click, offering quick calculations and reference information for various radiological measurements and assessments.

items.content_html: For Windows/Linux dvorak users! Built for Windows (ahk-v2), Linux (v1.0) & Win-XP (v1.1). There's LockWorkStation (RWIN), rename (!r), explorer (!e), duplicate (!d), Dvorak toggle (^!+d), transparency (#t), AlwaysOnTop (#SPACE), suspend (^!SPACE), TitleBar toggle (F12), grip (^F12), window-lists (F11 & +F11) & ControlList (^F11).
items.title: TinosNitso/AutoHotkey: For Windows/Linux dvorak users! Built for Windows (ahk-v2), Linux (v1.0) & Win-XP (v1.1).
